prs.title: feat(las-admin): 每日退订归因分析报告及通知
prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add analysis refund notify cron and template

Introduces a cron-based analysis refund notification feature, including configuration options, service logic, and a markdown template for notifications. Adds template management and testing utilities, updates service initialization to support cron jobs, and refines configuration and database handling for manager-specific operations. Also updates dependencies in go.mod and go.sum.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add refund analysis report and template rendering

Introduces AnalysisRefundReport and RefundReasonStats structs to encapsulate refund statistics. Replaces hardcoded markdown message with template rendering for refund analysis notifications, improving flexibility and maintainability.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add LLM config and AI refund analysis service

Introduces LLM configuration to the admin config and example YAML, adds dependency on go-openai, and implements AIAnalyzeRefundReason in a new service for analyzing refund reasons using an LLM. Includes corresponding unit tests for the new AI analysis functionality.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor AI refund reason prompts for clarity

Extracted and expanded the system and user prompts for AI refund reason analysis into dedicated constants. The new prompts provide detailed instructions and a markdown template for more structured and informative AI-generated summaries.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Fix conflicts

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Adjust prompt

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refine AI refund analysis prompts and templates

Improved the system and user prompts for AI-based refund reason analysis to provide more detailed, structured, and markdown-formatted responses. Updated the template to clarify required sections, add more explicit instructions, and ensure content length does not exceed 4096 bytes. Also added guidance for handling mixed Chinese-English content and improved clarity in the summary and breakdown of refund reasons.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor refund analysis to use AI-driven reporting

Replaces static refund analysis templates and logic with a dynamic AI-driven report generation flow. Updates the refund analysis service and tests to use a new prompt template and OpenAI-based analysis, removes the old notify template, and migrates to the go-workwx/v2 client. Also updates database access patterns and configuration usage for improved flexibility.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Enhance refund analysis reporting and template

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add retry with backoff to AI analysis report call

Replaces the previous retry logic in SendAnalysisRefundNotify with a maximum of 3 retries and exponential backoff when calling the AIDataAnalyzeReport API. Adds logging for failed attempts and truncates the message if it exceeds the allowed length after retries.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor LLM client initialization and test config setup

Moved LLM client initialization to the Service struct and constructor, replacing per-call instantiation. Added a shared test config in main_test.go for use in other test files. Updated tests to use the shared config and refactored date formats for consistency. Improved retry and truncation logic in SendAnalysisRefundNotify.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Skip TestSendAnalysisRefundNotify in CI environment

Added a check to skip the TestSendAnalysisRefundNotify test when running in a CI environment by checking the ENV environment variable. This prevents the test from running in CI where it may not be appropriate or possible.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Improve refund analysis and LLM client configuration

Added comments and improved struct documentation in analysis.go. Enhanced refund reason query with ordering and limit, and improved backoff handling to respect context cancellation. Configured HTTP transport settings for the LLM client to optimize connection management.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add unsubscribe report entity and enhance refund analysis

Introduces the UnsubscribeReport entity for storing daily, weekly, and monthly unsubscribe reports. Updates refund analysis to cover the last seven days instead of two, persists AI-generated reports to the database, and updates the template and related logic accordingly. Also fixes struct naming and improves logging.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Update LLM config comment and analysis data struct

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add UTF-8 safe string truncation utility

Introduced TruncateByBytes in pkg/utils for safely truncating UTF-8 strings by byte length with optional omission. Updated analysis refund notification to use this utility for WeChat message length limits. Added comprehensive unit tests for the new utility.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Specify columns in refund reason query

Added a Select clause to explicitly specify the columns ('id', 'created_at', 'reason', 'description') retrieved from the 'refund_reason' table in the SendAnalysisRefundNotify method.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update unsubscribe report upsert logic

Include 'updated_at' in upserted columns and use EndOfDay for the report date when creating or updating UnsubscribeReport records.

prs.title: 资源编排二期PR（除了RFS外的所有代码变更）
prs.author: zhangzqs

commits.author: zhangzqs
commits.message: feat(pkg/reqid): 实现reqid中间件+单元测试补充 (#772)

commits.author: zhangzqs
commits.message:
RFS二期SDK实现/数据库表结构定义/一期代码重构 (#581)

<!--
关联 Issue
Closes #IssueNumber
Fixes #IssueNumber
Resolves #IssueNumber1, #IssueNumber2
Related to #IssueNumber
See #IssueNumber
-->

<!--
是否有以下种类的文档更新，如果没有课忽略
- 架构文档
- 对外 api 文档
- 非 常规 升级文档链接
-->

代码变更：
1. rfsworker和原先的internal api后面计划下线，这里先把相关client代码移出api包，进入rfsworker内部
2. 为RFS二期添加一些外部API接口客户端和字段
3. 实现RFS二期rfsjob内部API客户端
4. 优化Dockerfile文件，后面rfsjob也在该文件中添加rfsjob镜像构建Dockerfile
5. rfs隐藏用户GetStack时的OperationID字段

rfs服务代码重构：
1.
rfs的stack路由使用分级路由，统一在stackName层添加stackMiddleware用于根据id|name提取stack实体对象注入context中
2.
除stackMiddleware中间件外，handler层访问到service层全部统一使用stackID操作，避免service层既有XxxByUIDName又有XxxByID，简化service层实现
3.
使用stackID前缀区分一期和二期创建的stack，对Delete请求在handler层将请求路由到不同的service实现，对Create请求计划默认走v2（当前v2未实现先走v1）
4. 一些二期计划移除的代码拆出单独文件，后期可以直接删除
5. stg数据库操作层仍然在service和servicev2之间可以复用
6. stg层进一步封装，对外的接口不对外暴露gorm的任何细节，包括gorm的错误
7. 数据库实体结构体定义所有字段显式定义表名，字段列名

commits.author: zhangzqs
commits.message:
资源编排二期 PR 拆分（api/rfsjob/terraformprovider/pkg） (#923)

## 变更背景和解决方案

关联issue: #

## 文档更新（架构文档、API文档、升级文档）

### API 包变更
1. 漏了一个ListStackPlans接口定义，漏了ApplyStackPlan的ForceRefresh字段
2. operationID前缀变更
3. TerraformState数据库字段使用nullable表达无状态时为null
4. Stack表移除Destroy字段，改为RFSJobStatus+RFSJobStatusReason字段
5. Condition 补充了多个状态时的或逻辑
6. 添加Kodo Bucket名称校验逻辑
7. 添加状态迁移校验逻辑
8. 添加一些错误码

### RFSJob 变更
1. Kodo上传适配测试环境，允许自定义kodo上传地址
2.
配置字段从sec.Secret换回string，因为此处Config结构体不仅用于rfsjob的反序列化，还用于rfs的json序列化，使用sec.Secret会导致序列化异常
3. 移除不必要的mockrfs代码逻辑，简化实现
4. 集测允许关闭上传到kodo，默认在travis CI环境中不上传到kodo，否则将的非常变慢

### Provider 变更
1. 环境变量名称写错

### pkg基础库变更
1. 签名库与鉴权中间件日志补充签名失败时的日志
2. 配置加载强制约束必须为knownfields字段
3. dblocker实现Cleaner接口

## Checklist

- [x] 确认是否有文档更新
- [x] 确认是否自测
- [x] 确认是否考虑兼容升级，不兼容升级需要有对应的解决方案
- [x] 确认是否考虑添加监控指标
- [x] API 设计是否符合 [API
设计规范](https://github.com/qbox/las/blob/develop/docs/api/README.md), 如果没有
API 变更，请忽略
- [x] 我已经添加了相关人员到 Reviewers 列表中
- [x] 我已经设置了 Development 关联的 Issue

commits.message:
feat(totp): 支持通过配置禁用 TOTP 检查功能

该提交在配置文件中新增 `disableTotpCheck` 开关选项，当设置为 true 时系统将跳过 TOTP 双因素认证检查。主要修改包括：在配置结构体添加禁用开关字段、重构 TOTP 检查逻辑至独立方法、增加配置项到 YAML 文件，并添加单元测试验证开关功能。

分析代码变更，主要涉及三个关键调整：
1. 将置放组验证逻辑从后置检查改为创建实例前的预处理
2. 移除重复的置放组分配逻辑，保持代码单一职责原则

refactor(instance.go): 集中处理非GPU实例的区域资源更新与回滚逻辑

将CPU实例的资源扣减和回滚操作从条件分支移至统一处理流程，通过计算总资源消耗量后批量更新区域资源，消除条件块内的分散资源管理代码，提升代码可维护性。

feat(order): 添加本地订单和商品订单结构体，更新订单相关文档

commits.author: jimyag
commits.message:
feat(订单管理): 重构订单结构体，新增退款状态及实例续费请求参数

- 更新 `LocalOrder` 和 `LocalProductOrder` 结构体，简化字段定义，移除 GORM 标签。
- 新增 `Refunding` 和 `Refunded` 业务状态，完善订单状态管理。
- 添加 `RenewInstanceRequest` 结构体以支持实例续费请求。
- 更新相关文档，详细描述订单及实例的管理逻辑。

这次提交主要将`DurationUnit`字段重命名为`PeriodUnit`以提升命名一致性，同步更新了Go实体结构、API文档和产品文档中的相关字段名称及注释说明。修改后的字段命名更准确反映"周期单位"的业务含义，同时修正了文档中过时的示例描述，保持代码与文档的术语统一。

prs.title: refactor(api sdk): add qiniu api client
prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Add bo api client

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor Qiniu client and entity structure

Moved Qiniu client and related entities from 'api/bo' and 'pkg/qiniu' to 'api/qiniu/client' and 'api/qiniu/entity'. Unified client logic, added trade and developer API methods, and updated tests and entity definitions to reflect new structure. Deprecated old client and trade files.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor admin handlers to use new qiniu client

Replaced usage of the old qiniu client with the new qiniu client from 'api/qiniu/client' across admin handlers and configuration. Added developer handler and updated trade handlers to use new entity types and client methods. Updated route registration to include developer endpoint and refactored controller initialization accordingly. Also updated example config to include new host_api field.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add developer detail view and related modules

Introduces developer detail page with navigation, data fetching, and UI enhancements using @ant-design/pro-components. Adds developer model, service, and transform utilities. Updates styles and refactors instance and developer views for improved usability and integration.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor Qiniu client structure and config usage

Split Qiniu client into separate Trade and Developer clients with dedicated constructors. Updated configuration field names for consistency and improved integration with admin config. Adjusted tests and handler initialization to use new client structure and config format.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Refactor Qiniu client config and handler usage

Renamed client.go to config.go and refactored OAuthConfig to use sync.Once for transport initialization. Updated Config struct to use pointers for OAuth and Resty configs. Refactored developer and trade client constructors to use the new config structure. Updated internal admin handlers to use separate tradeClient and developerClient fields instead of a combined qiniuClient. Added and improved tests for developer and trade clients.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update staging host URLs in main_test.go

Changed SofaHost and HostMorse URLs to use the jfcs-k8s-qa1 subdomain for consistency with other service hosts.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update OAuth transport and pagination handling

Refactored OAuthConfig.Transport to set transport only on successful initialization. Updated trade.go to clarify seller_id and pagination logic, ensuring seller_id defaults to LAS merchant and page indexing starts from 0. Adjusted ListOrderRequest comments to reflect BO interface pagination behavior. Updated MorseClientID in main_test.go.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add additional API documentation links for orders

Added references to related documentation in the product repository for ListOrders and GetOrder methods to improve clarity and provide more context for API usage.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Remove redundant transport check in OAuthConfig

Eliminated the unnecessary nil check for the transport field in the Transport method of OAuthConfig, streamlining the initialization logic.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: Exclude api/qiniu, cmd and internal/admin from coverage

commit 21cf64356e341ae45f4e58022febbb599a9cce58
Author: Jie Liu <eirture@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Aug 15 11:46:58 2025 +0800

    fix(daemon): avoid to report dirty vm status (#610)

    See #606

    daemon 中会监听 kubevirt vmi 资源的变化，来更新 vm 的状态和节点信息。还会定时 list 所有 vmi，同步 vm
    的状态和节点信息。但是随着 vmi 数量的增加，一次 list 的同步时间会变长。导致后面的 vmi 即使更新的时间和 list
    时间相差很大。而在这个时间差之内，如果 vmi 变更，被 watch 的逻辑处理。list 更新还会用旧的信息覆盖 watch 更新的信息。

    为了避免这个问题，增加一个 set 用于记录 list 以后，有哪些 vmi 变化了（在 watch 逻辑中处理过了）。如果 list
    处理的循环中发现这个 vmi 在 set 中，就跳过。每次 list 请求之前清空这个 set。

    las-liujie-dev 环境测试，验证虚机状态上报正常。

    难以模拟问题出现条件，回归正常就可以。

    全回归通过
    https://jenkins.qiniu.io/view/LAS/job/las-k8s-dev-pipeline/200/

    针对性case 并发回归 未再出现

    Co-authored-by: xwen-winnie <657844267@qq.com>

commits.message:
chore(service): 优化导入语句顺序及代码格式

这个提交主要调整了Kubernetes相关依赖的导入顺序，将applyconfigurations系列包统一归并到客户端工具包引用之前，同时移除了多余的空行。这些改动符合Go语言官方推荐的导入分组规范（标准库 > 第三方库 > 内部库），提升了代码的可维护性和可读性。

commits.author: jimyag
commits.message:
fix(k8s-job): 移除镜像URL的docker://前缀并添加FieldManager配置

这个提交主要包含两个关键修改：1. 在创建Kubernetes作业时移除镜像URL的docker://协议前缀，并在获取历史作业时重新添加该前缀，保持数据一致性；2. 在创建ServiceAccount和ClusterRoleBinding时添加FieldManager字段，明确资源管理者为las-daemon服务，避免与其他控制器产生冲突。同时将服务名称提取为公共常量，提升代码可维护性。

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Enhance VM order modal UI and spec selection

Increased modal width for better layout and improved the spec selection dropdown to display detailed spec information with ellipsis and secondary text. This provides users with clearer choices when creating VM orders.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Remove unused Col and Row imports in CreateVMOrder.tsx

Cleaned up imports by removing unused Col and Row components from the Ant Design library in the CreateVMOrder.tsx file.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add required validation to UID input in developer search

Introduced a validation rule to the UID input field in the developer search form, requiring users to enter a UID before submitting. This improves form usability and prevents empty search submissions.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add IP address column to instances table

Introduces a new column displaying IP addresses in the developer instances table. Also adds ellipsis to the instance name column for improved UI.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add refund reason and description to instance refund

Enhanced the instance refund process to require a reason and optional description. Updated backend and frontend interfaces, models, and UI to support selecting and submitting refund reasons, improving traceability and user experience.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update dependencies in website package files

Upgraded multiple dependencies and devDependencies in package.json and package-lock.json for internal/admin/website, including @tanstack/react-query, ahooks, antd, axios, react-router-dom, @vitejs/plugin-react, eslint, typescript-eslint, and others. This ensures the project uses the latest versions for improved features, bug fixes, and compatibility.

prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Remove default labels from issue templates

Deleted the 'labels' field from all GitHub issue templates to prevent automatic label assignment. Also simplified the deploy template's upgrade plan table by removing unused columns.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Add title and labels to issue templates

Added a default title to the deploy issue template and a bug label to the bug report template to improve issue categorization and workflow.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update pull request template formatting and checklist

Removed extra blank lines and improved formatting in the pull request template. Added checklist items for adding reviewers and setting related development issues to enhance review process.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
Update deploy and PR templates for clarity

Improved the deploy issue template by adding placeholders for gitlab and jenkins, and removed default example values for better usability. Updated the PR template to use an external API design spec link and removed unused self-test and QA sections for conciseness.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): Add VM order creation functionality and UI components

- Implemented the VM order creation API in the manager client.
- Added CreateVMOrderRequest struct and CreateVMOrder handler in the admin.
- Registered the new route for creating VM orders.
- Developed CreateVMOrderModal component for user input in the frontend.
- Integrated the modal into the Instances view for seamless order creation.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(admin): Update CreateVMOrder component for improved callback handling

- Renamed the callback prop from `onOrder` to `onSuccess` in CreateVMOrderProps for clarity.
- Updated the CreateVMOrderModal to use the new `onSuccess` prop.
- Changed the instance fetching function name from `fetchInstanceTypes` to `fetchInstances` for consistency.
- Integrated the `onSuccess` callback in the Instances view to close the modal and refresh the instance list upon successful order creation.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
fix(admin): Update permissions for VM order creation route and enhance UI visibility

- Changed the permission required for the VM order creation route from "instance" to "system".
- Updated the Instances view to conditionally render the CreateVMOrderModal based on the current user's permissions, ensuring only authorized users can create VM orders.

prs.title: refactor(las-admin): ACL & PG
prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(database): add database configuration and connection management

- Introduced a new Config struct for database connection settings, including DSN and connection pool parameters.
- Implemented a Database struct to manage database connections using GORM.
- Added a custom logger for GORM to handle logging with context support and slow query thresholds.
- Created methods for establishing database connections and setting connection pool configurations.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(database): integrate PostgreSQL support and enhance user management

- Added PostgreSQL database configuration to the application, including a new DSN in the config.
- Implemented GORM-based database connection management for user and role entities.
- Enhanced user and role data migration processes to support the new database structure.
- Updated user and role entity definitions to include GORM annotations for better ORM functionality.
- Refactored user service methods to utilize the new database connection and improve data handling.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: refactor(logger): remove unnecessary blank line in NewLogger function

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(acl): update Permission and Role structures for GORM compatibility

- Changed ID type in Permission from string to uint.
- Updated GORM tags for fields in Permission and Role to ensure proper indexing and size constraints.
- Refactored RolePermission structure and its table name.
- Enhanced user and role management by modifying service methods to utilize GORM for database operations.
- Improved error handling and logging in role and user service methods.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(acl): add timestamps to Role structure and update role listing order

- Introduced CreatedAt and UpdatedAt fields to the Role structure for better tracking of role creation and modification times.
- Updated the ListRoles method to order roles by CreatedAt in ascending order, improving the retrieval of roles based on their creation time.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(database): simplify Config struct and update database initialization

- Removed embedded GORM.Config from Config struct to streamline configuration.
- Updated database initialization to use a new instance of gorm.Config, ensuring compatibility with the latest GORM practices.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(database): update connection pool parameters in Config struct

- Removed maxOpenConns and connMaxLifeTime constants from Config struct.
- Renamed ConnMaxLifeTime to ConnMaxLifeSecond and ConnMaxIdleTime to ConnMaxIdleSecond for clarity.
- Updated database initialization to reflect new parameter names and ensure proper handling of connection lifetimes.

prs.title: refactor(admin): Remove mongo dependencies
prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(admin): migrate from MongoDB to PostgreSQL and clean up configuration

- Removed MongoDB configuration and related code from admin example YAML and Go files.
- Updated entity definitions to use GORM for PostgreSQL, including changes to ID handling and collection structures.
- Introduced a new entity package for pagination and ID generation utilities.
- Cleaned up service layer by removing MongoDB dependencies and migration logic.

prs.title: refactor: migrate las-admin/admin client
prs.author: miclle

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): add AdminImportPublicIP and AdminRecyclePublicIP methods to manage public IPs

- Introduced new methods in AdminPublicIPsInterface for importing and recycling public IPs.
- Updated IPList, PublicIPImport, and PublicIPRecycle handlers to utilize the new admin client methods.
- Enhanced error messages in the frontend for better debugging during import and recycle operations.
- Removed the deprecated manager package related to IP management.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): implement AdminRegionsInterface for region management

- Added AdminRegionsInterface to handle region-related operations including listing, creating, and deleting regions.
- Updated AdminClient to implement the new interface methods.
- Refactored existing region handling in the admin controller to utilize the new AdminClient methods.
- Removed the deprecated region management code from the manager package.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): add AdminInstanceTypesInterface for managing instance types

- Introduced AdminInstanceTypesInterface to handle operations related to instance types, including creation, listing, updating, and deletion.
- Updated AdminClient to implement the new interface methods.
- Refactored admin handlers to utilize the new AdminInstanceTypesInterface for instance type management.
- Removed the deprecated instance management code from the manager package.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): add deprecated ListSpec method for spec management

- Introduced ListSpec method in AdminInstanceTypesInterface to retrieve specifications, marked as deprecated.
- Updated AdminClient to implement the new ListSpec method.
- Refactored admin handlers to utilize the updated AdminClient for spec management.
- Removed the obsolete spec management code from the manager package.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message: fix: remove redundant import of resty.dev/v3 in admin_instance_type.go

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): implement AdminActivityInterface for activity management

- Added AdminActivityInterface to manage promotional activities, including creation, listing, updating, and deletion.
- Updated AdminClient to implement the new interface methods.
- Refactored admin handlers to utilize the new AdminActivityInterface for activity management.
- Removed the obsolete activity management code from the manager package.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): add AdminPriceInterface for price management

- Introduced AdminPriceInterface to handle operations related to price configurations and tables, including creation, listing, updating, and deletion.
- Updated AdminClient to implement the new AdminPriceInterface methods.
- Refactored admin handlers to utilize the new AdminPriceInterface for price management.
- Removed obsolete price management code from the manager package.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
feat(admin): Optimized the interface for updating and deleting activity specifications
- Updated the UpdateActivitySpec and DeleteActivitySpec methods, replacing the original URL encoding method with path parameters and query parameters, thereby improving the code's readability and maintainability.
- Removed unnecessary imports and simplified the code structure.

commits.author: miclle
commits.message:
refactor(admin): rename interfaces for consistency and clarity

- Updated interface names from *Interface to *Manager for AdminActivity, AdminInstanceTypes, AdminInstances, AdminPrice, AdminPublicIPs, and AdminRegions to enhance clarity and consistency across the codebase.
- Refactored AdminClient methods to align with the new interface naming conventions.
- Adjusted admin handlers to utilize the updated method names, improving code readability and maintainability.

prs.title: 实现 Issue #566: 给该项目建立claude 友好的CLAUDE.md文件
prs.author: qiniu-ci

commits.author: qiniu-ci
commits.message: Initial plan for Issue #566: 给该项目建立claude 友好的CLAUDE.md文件

commits.author: qiniu-ci
commits.message:
docs: add Claude-friendly project documentation

Add comprehensive CLAUDE.md file to help AI assistants understand the Light Application Server (LAS) project structure and functionality. The documentation includes:

- Project overview and microservices architecture
- Technology stack (Go, React, TypeScript, MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
- Directory structure and core services explanation
- Development setup and build instructions using Task
- Configuration files and deployment guidance
- API documentation references and contribution guidelines

This enables better AI assistance for development tasks by providing clear context about the cloud infrastructure management platform and its various components (Manager, Admin, Daemon, RFS, Traffic Filter).

Closes #566

commits.author: qiniu-ci
commits.message:
docs: add frontend-specific CLAUDE.md documentation

Add comprehensive CLAUDE.md file for the front/portal directory to help AI assistants understand the React/TypeScript frontend architecture. The documentation includes:

- Technology stack details (React 17, TypeScript, MobX, React-Icecream)
- Project structure and layered architecture principles
- Development environment setup and build commands
- Core functional modules (Instance Management, RFS)
- State management patterns with MobX stores
- Routing, styling with CSS Modules, and testing strategies
- Build/deployment processes and development guidelines
- Common development patterns and troubleshooting guide

This enables better AI assistance for frontend development tasks within the LAS Portal application's unique architecture and internal Qiniu toolchain.

Closes #566
